items.title: Core contract and doc-index baseline
dod: docs/00_CORE.md and docs/02_workflow.md are consistent
README doc index check passes
workflow gate enforces CURRENT.md + AI contract presence
items.notes: Contract-first baseline already in repo and enforced by verify_repo.

items.title: External run_dir contract and pointer-only repo policy
dod: run_dir is outside repo (CTCP_RUNS_ROOT)
repo stores only meta/run_pointers/*
anti-pollution gate fails on in-repo run/build outputs
items.notes: External run path and anti-pollution checks are active.

items.title: Project-level foundation-first queue and planning docs
dod: execution_queue.json exists and is current authority
docs/25_project_plan.md explains queue vs CURRENT vs run PLAN
meta/tasks/TEMPLATE.md contains queue item fields and forbids Queue Item N/A escape
items.notes: Queue/current/report closure and verify naming consistency are being unified in docs-first patch.

items.title: Artifact-driven orchestrator gates
dod: new-run/status/advance follow artifact gates
find_result resolver-first gate exists
review approve gate enforced before signed PLAN execution
items.notes: Implemented and regression-covered in recent lite suites.

items.title: Librarian file_request to context_pack budget path
dod: ctcp-file-request-v1 input accepted
ctcp-context-pack-v1 output produced with budget enforcement
omitted reasons include too_large/denied/irrelevant
items.notes: Budgeted context_pack path is implemented and covered.

items.title: Dispatcher/provider bridge with manual outbox
dod: dispatch_config controls role providers
manual_outbox prompts generated with target-path constraints
local_exec is librarian-only
outbox budget limit enforced
items.notes: Manual outbox and local librarian auto-exec are active.

items.title: FAIL -> failure_bundle -> fix loop -> PASS hard closure
dod: verify fail writes FAIL report with failures[]
failure_bundle.zip has required minimum contents
fixer refill patch in same run can converge to VERIFY_PASSED and run pass
items.notes: S15/S16 now hard-lock failure bundle creation and fixer loop convergence to VERIFY_PASSED.

items.title: Contrast artifact auto-summary from verify evidence
dod: contrast summary generated from verify_report + trace
summary points to actionable failure classes
summary captured in run artifacts and LAST report references

tests: new lite scenario for contrast generation

items.title: Deploy/merge and release report closure
dod: run pass can produce release report
report links signed plan, verify evidence, and scope summary
merge/deploy handoff checklist documented

items.title: Workflow registry last-known-good and history sedimentation
dod: successful runs update reusable workflow evidence
externals candidate inputs can be promoted into registry with review
history is queryable by resolver without replacing find_result authority

tests: resolver regression scenarios with history inputs

items.title: Global optimization: parallelism, budget strategy, optional GUI suspension
dod: parallel execution policy documented
token/context budget strategy documented and enforceable
GUI optional path remains non-blocking for core gates
items.notes: P0 slice in progress: simlab worktree sandbox + unified build root/launcher/parallel verify path.

items.title: Telegram support bot task-oriented dialogue guardrails
dod: remove generic chitchat fallback and enforce task-entry first sentence
only reference previous project context on explicit continuation intent
each customer-facing turn includes one concrete next action or constrained option set
items.notes: User requested MD-driven execution to shift from generic assistant-style chatting to professional task-oriented support dialogue.

items.title: Fixed 10-step workflow hardening with triplet pre-verify guard
dod: execution order is fixed to 10-step with mandatory analysis/find before plan and plan before implementation
local check/contrast/fix loop is explicit and requires triplet guard contract tests before final verify
completion requires evidence for connected plus accumulated plus consumed
items.notes: Hardens workflow contracts and executable gates to prevent docs-only or prompt-only completion for integration defects.

items.title: Single-purpose, single-flow, single-responsibility operating model refactor
dod: repo purpose truth source is singular and explicit
canonical execution flow truth source is singular and explicit
current task truth fields are mandatory and gate-enforced
items.notes: Consolidates purpose/flow/task/runtime truth ownership and narrows subsystem docs to non-competing roles.

items.title: Scaffold dual-source mode with controlled live-reference export
dod: scaffold and scaffold-pointcloud support source-mode template or live-reference with template as default
live-reference export is manifest-whitelisted, path-safe, auditable, and records source commit plus source mode metadata
generated projects keep CTCP contract chain compatibility and verify through scripts/verify_repo entrypoint
items.notes: Adds a controlled live-reference exporter without breaking existing template scaffolding behavior.

items.title: Text-first frontend control plane with single CTCP execution bridge
dod: frontend text control plane routes greeting and smalltalk away from project planning while preserving PM-style project handling
frontend execution mutations and run-state queries go through scripts/ctcp_front_bridge.py bridge capabilities only
tests cover greeting isolation, detailed requirement understanding, duplicate-question prevention, leakage guard, single-bridge invocation path, and non-contradictory visible state
items.notes: Implements phase 1-2 frontend behavior and wiring while preserving future realtime extension boundaries.
